E

Element - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.GameCard
This enumeration defines all the types of symbols that can be present in a corner or as a list in the center
ElementsObjectiveCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.ObjectiveCards
ElementsObjectiveCard represents an objective card that requires to have a certain number of Elements in order for it to be completed: extends a general ObjectiveCard
ElementsObjectiveCard(int, int, int[]) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.CardDesign.ObjectiveCards.ElementsObjectiveCard
constructor method for an ElementObjectiveCard object
EmptyDeckException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Exceptions
This exception is thrown when someone tries to draw a card from a deck, but there are no cards left.
EmptyDeckException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Exceptions.EmptyDeckException
Class constructor, specifying message
enableCommand() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLI
Allow user to enter commands
END - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.State
 
END_GAME - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CommandsCLI.CommandInstruction
 
endGame() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.GameModel
It calculates the endgame points of the match and defines the result of it.
EndGameEvent - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events
Event to end tha game
EndGameEvent() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.EndGameEvent
 
Event - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events
Abstract class that defines an event that allows the client to execute a model function requires method executeCommand
Event() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.Event
 
EventListener - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Controller
Interface that defines an event listener: requires method actionPerformed
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.ChatEvent
Send a message in the chat
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.DistributeCardsEvent
Distribute cards to the players, in order to start the match.
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.DrawCardEvent
Draw a card for the player
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.EndGameEvent
It calculates the endgame points of the match and defines the result of it.
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.Event
Execute the command of a listened event Each subclass of Event overrides this method
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.GetPlaceablePositionsEvent
Check which positions are available for placing, around a selected card.
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.JoinMatchEvent
Add the users in the lobby as players of the match
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.PlaceCardEvent
Place the card for the player
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.PlaceStartCardEvent
Place the start card for the player
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.SelectColourEvent
Assign a colour to the player
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.SelectObjectiveEvent
Assign the secret objective to the player
executeCommand(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Network.Messages.Events.StartMatchEvent
Add the users in the lobby as players of the match
